content.text:
Here are some of the best options for acne-focused facial treatments in Katy, Texas, based on up-to-date information:

· Oasis Laser MedSpa (25145 Star Ln, Suite 301, Katy, TX 77494) offers an "Acne Facial" that targets teens and adults, designed to reduce the appearance of acne, calm inflammation, and address acne scars and hyperpigmentation. They also provide an Acne IPL (Intense Pulsed Light) treatment sold in 1-, 3-, or 5-session packages to help eliminate acne-causing bacteria and improve hyperpigmentation. ([oasis-laser-medspa.square.site](https://oasis-laser-medspa.square.site/?utm_source=openai))

· AcuQi TCM Spa / Holistique Spa (406 W. Grand Parkway S, Suite 280, Katy, TX 77494) provides an “Acne Deep-Cleanse/Healing Facial” at about $160 per hour. This includes deep cleansing, exfoliation, extractions, high-frequency treatment, AcuQi facial massage (face and décolleté), mask, and nourishment. ([holistiquespa.com](https://www.holistiquespa.com/service-page/holistic-lymphatic-acne-healing-facial?utm_source=openai))

· Divine Skin Studio (23410 Grand Reserve Dr. #1101, Katy, TX) offers an “Acne Facial” that uses exfoliation and a salicylic acid mask to remove impurities, unclog pores, reduce oil production, and calm inflammation—ideal for active acne and oily, acne-prone skin. ([thedivineskinstudio.com](https://www.thedivineskinstudio.com/?utm_source=openai))

· Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness (26622 Cook Field Rd, Suite 300, Katy, TX 77494) offers a comprehensive suite for acne treatment including chemical peels, HydraFacial™, medical-grade skincare, microneedling, and even specialized PCOS acne treatment protocols. ([hibiscus.health](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/?utm_source=openai))

· Katy Medi Spa (21238 Kingsland Blvd Ste. 1B, Katy, TX 77450) is a physician-led medical spa offering a wide range of advanced facial solutions for acne-prone skin. Services include microneedling to target acne scars, chemical peels, IPL photofacials, skin resurfacing, dermaplaning, and microdermabrasion. All treatments are customized and medically supervised. ([katymedispa.com](https://www.katymedispa.com/?utm_source=openai))

· Hydro Esthetics (26077 Nelson Way, Suite 603, Katy, TX 77494) is a facial spa offering acne facials, deep cleansing, LED phototherapy, microneedling, IPL rejuvenation, chemical peels, microdermabrasion, and more. Reviews emphasize excellent care, noticeable results, and a comfortable, personalized experience. ([salondiscover.com](https://salondiscover.com/hydro-esthetics-77494/?utm_source=openai))

---

Recommendations by skin type and needs:

1. **Custom-tailored acne treatment combining med-tech + at-home plan**  
   *AcneFix®* (707 S Fry Rd, Ste. 495) focuses purely on acne care through consultations, extractions, high-frequency therapy, LED light therapy, and a personalized Clear Skin Protocol for at-home maintenance. They report most clients see improvement in 3–4 months. ([acnefix.com](https://www.acnefix.com/locations/katy?utm_source=openai))

2. **Holistic, deep-cleansing facial with traditional and TCM elements**  
   *AcuQi TCM Spa / Holistique* offers a hybrid approach of high-frequency, massage-based, holistic treatments—ideal for those seeking a nurturing, multi-step ritual that addresses inflammation, healing, and balance. ([holistiquespa.com](https://www.holistiquespa.com/service-page/holistic-lymphatic-acne-healing-facial?utm_source=openai))

3. **Medical-grade spa options with advanced resurfacing/laser technologies**  
   *Katy Medi Spa* and *Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness* are excellent if you're looking for aggressive results. Their offerings (IPL, peels, microneedling) are ideal for scars, hyperpigmentation, active breakouts, and preventative maintenance. ([hibiscus.health](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/?utm_source=openai))

4. **Boutique, personalized spa experiences with glowing results**  
   *Hydro Esthetics* and *Divine Skin Studio* are highly rated for their hands-on, comfortable facials and attentive care—great if you prefer a spa-like ritual with visible improvements. ([salondiscover.com](https://salondiscover.com/hydro-esthetics-77494/?utm_source=openai))

---

How to choose the best option for you:

· Identify your main goals: are you looking to control breakouts, treat acne scars, reduce oil, or manage long-term skin health?  
· Consider how aggressive you want treatment to be—medical spas typically offer faster results, while spas may offer a gentler, more soothing approach.  
· Check reviews and available pricing—some options offer clear, transparent costs (like AcneFix consultation + $100 treatments), while others may need you to call for details.  
· Book an initial consultation: most locations will assess your skin and recommend a treatment plan tailored to your skin type, acne severity, and lifestyle.

Let me know if you'd like help narrowing down based on your specific skin type, concerns, or location within Katy!
